falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this key trendline would invalidate the 'bottom' pattern and suggest a new uptrend, contradicting the current HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 2x the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in trading activity would indicate a blowoff top or breakout, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' phase and suggesting a clear directional move.

falsification_conditions.condition: Central bank intervenes with a policy announcement (e.g., rate cut or stimulus) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: An unexpected macro event would override the pattern-based analysis, making the current 'UNKNOWN' verdict obsolete by introducing a new, observable driver.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
